emails.subject: Another call
emails.body: Another call You are not going to believe this, but I just got another phone call asking if you are leaving? Rumors are going around that you are leaving.

emails.subject: Re: Another call
emails.body: Re: Another call From whom? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: Another call
emails.body: Re: Another call Am I getting a good package? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Another call
emails.body: RE: Another call Dina called and said she heard rumors on her floor that you were leaving. I don't know are you? If so, is there a good package also for an Assistant. To: Sweet, Twanda
